feed.title: Poznan Studies in Contemporary Linguistics
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Poznan Studies in Contemporary Linguistics (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Scaling on-device spoken language understanding to new languages with large language models
entry.summary: Authors: Jakub Hoscilowicz, Pawel Pawlowski, Marcin Skorupa, Marcin Sowanski, Artur Janicki DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psicl-2025-0053 Pages: Page range: 183-204

entry.title: Spoken language corpora augmentation with domain-specific voice-cloned speech
entry.summary: Authors: Mateusz Czyżnikiewicz, Łukasz Bondaruk, Jakub Kubiak, Adam Wiącek, Łukasz Degórski, Marek Kubis, Paweł Skórzewski DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psicl-2025-0052 Pages: Page range: 205-222

entry.title: Feature comparison between human-written and LLM-generated documents – a case study
entry.summary: Authors: Miłosz Kutyła, Paweł Gryka, Marek Kozłowski, Kacper Gradoń, Artur Janicki DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psicl-2025-0063 Pages: Page range: 223-247

entry.title: CNN-based named entity linking: Serbian use case
entry.summary: Authors: Milica Ikonić Nešić, Saša Petalinkar, Olivera Kitanović, Ranka Stanković, Miloš Utvić DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psicl-2025-0064 Pages: Page range: 249-280

entry.title: Towards building a database of Croatian prepositions – theoretical and practical prerequisites
entry.summary: Authors: Ivana Matas Ivanković, Daniela Katunar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psicl-2025-0082 Pages: Page range: 281-303
